basic_details.job_title: NDMA Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) has officially announced the Senior Consultant Recruitment 2026 with 5 openings. The detailed notification was published on 19 May 2026 at the official NDMA website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 50 years (62 years for retired Government employees) and hold a Master's Degree in the relevant field with the required post-qualification experience can now submit their online applications up to 08 June 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years For retired Govt. employees: 62 years

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in relevant field, Minimum 5 years post qualification experience in relevant area
qualification.details: Senior Consultant (Community Based Disaster Risk Reduction): Master Degree in the field of Social Science/ Science/ Disaster Management/ Two years PG Diploma in Disaster Management. Desirable: M.Phil or Ph.D in a relevant field. For Retired: experience of 5 years in Scale 11 (as per Seventh CPC). Senior Consultant (Mitigation of Floods): Master's degree in Water Resources Management, Water Resources Engineering, Hydrology, Disaster Management or any other disciplines related to Flood Management. Desirable: A research degree (M.Phil./Ph.D.) in Water Resource Management/ Hydrology. For Retired: matching education and experience with grade pay of INR 7,600/ or more. Senior Consultant (Disaster Risk Financing and Financial Management): Master's Degree/MBA in Economics, Finance from a recognized university. Desirable: PHD in concerned subject and Prior experience of working with Financial and Insurance Products for Disaster Management. For Retired: matching education and experience with grade pay of INR 7,600/ or more. Senior Consultant (Technical Expert – Recovery Programmes (Productive/Livelihoods sectors)): A Master's Degree in Disaster Management, Economics, Public Policy, Livelihood, Agriculture, Rural Development or Social Entrepreneurship. Desirable: An advanced degree, such as a Ph.D. in a related discipline. For Retired: grade Pay in PB-13 and above with experience of more than 10 years. Senior Consultant (Technical Expert - Recovery Programmes (Structural-Social and Public Infrastructure sector)): Master's degree in Disaster Management/ Architecture/ Structural/ Civil Engineering/ Electrical engineering/ or Master's degree in urban planning/ Housing/ Rural Planning with bachelor's in architecture/ civil engineering. Desirable: An advanced degree, such as a Ph.D. in a related discipline. For Retired: grade Pay of Rs.8700 (pre-revised) / Level - 13 (7th CPC) and above with minimum experience of 5 years.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Senior Consultant (Community Based Disaster Risk Reduction)
Senior Consultant (Disaster Risk Financing and Financial Management)
Senior Consultant (Technical Expert – Recovery Programmes (Productive/Livelihoods sectors))
Senior Consultant (Technical Expert - Recovery Programmes (Structural-Social and Public Infrastructure sector))

selection_process: Application through NDMA job portal Scrutiny of applications
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the NDMA Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 08-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NDMA to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NDMA Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the NDMA Senior Consultant recruitment is 08 June 2026. Ensure all details are accurate before the deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Senior Consultant posts in NDMA?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Senior Consultant positions in the National Disaster Management Authority (NDMA) as per the latest recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Consultant roles?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in a relevant field and have a minimum of 5 years of post-qualification experience. Specific qualifications vary by specialization.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these positions?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Senior Consultant posts is 50 years. Retired government employees may have a relaxation up to 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for NDMA Senior Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the official notification, there is no application fee required for candidates belonging to any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Senior Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Senior Consultant posts will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 1,25,000/- to Rs. 1,75,000/-.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for NDMA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application process for the NDMA Senior Consultant recruitment is entirely online. Candidates need to apply through the official NDMA job portal.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The selection process primarily involves the application through the NDMA job portal followed by a scrutiny of the submitted applications.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for NDMA Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article. It contains all the detailed information about the recruitment.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Senior Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The Senior Consultant positions in the National Disaster Management Authority are offered on a contractual basis.
